title: Quarterly Career Review Session
description: Whether you're working towards a promotion, holding tight or on a break, these sessions create space to track progress, reflect and inspire insights

title: Data Structures & Algorithms - Intro Series - part 3
description: Part 3 of a short, structured series exploring the fundamentals of data structures and algorithms in a collaborative, discussion-led format.

title: Data Structures & Algorithms - Intro Series - part 2
description: Part 2 of a short, structured series exploring the fundamentals of data structures and algorithms in a collaborative, discussion-led format.

title: Data Structures & Algorithms - Intro Series - part 1
description: Part 1 of a short, structured series exploring the fundamentals of data structures and algorithms in a collaborative, discussion-led format.

title: Metrics and Monitoring Architecture Kata
description: We’ll work through a realistic Metrics & Monitoring scenario together - exploring observability, alerting, telemetry, scaling concerns, dashboards, reliability trade-offs and operational thinking. This kata will cover the design, but we'll also focus on the interview technique.

title: Outside-In TDD Shopping Cart Kata
description: A hands-on workshop in outside-in TDD using an excellent portfolio example. Starting from real user interactions, we’ll design a shopping cart from the API inward, using tests to drive behaviour, shape boundaries, and guide implementation.

title: Create a curated Learning Plan for the Roles you really want
description: A combined Career Corner and Bootcamp++ event about crafting your own curated learning plan, based on the roles you actually want in tech.

title: Get Comfortable with Git - Study Group
description: For those who want time to practice, ask questions or just work with others who are learning Git.

title: Test your Git skills
description: In this interactive lab, you'll put your git skills to the test with real scenarios.

title: Test your Git skills
description: In this interactive lab, you'll put your git skills to the test with real scenarios.

title: TDD Intro – Why, How & AI
description: We'll be covering why TDD is useful, how to get started using it, and the role that TDD plays in an AI-assisted world.

title: Ad Clickstream Architecture Kata
description: How would you design the data platform behind a high-volume ad clickstream? Our first Architecture Kata for 2026 is here, and we’re tackling a common interview scenario - covering scale, speed, real-time processing.

title: TDD Intro cycle
description: Recap the Hows & Whys of TDD and start practicing. We’ll do 2-3 practice katas and you’ll come away with the ability to continue practicing on your own or with an AI tool.
